title: The Mutiny
description:
THE MUTINY — OPEN WORLD ZOMBIE SURVIVAL RPG

Scavenge. Survive. Don't get infected.

The Mutiny is a third-person open-world zombie survival RPG. Scavenge an abandoned town above ground and the dark tunnel system beneath it, build your survivor from nothing, and fight to stay alive against the infected — solo or with up to 4 players online.

This is a small world built by one developer, and it grows every single month. Buy in early and watch it get bigger.

ABOVE GROUND AND BELOW

Explore a full town on the surface and the tunnel network running under it. Ziplines connect the world — hook on, ride, and drop into the fight.

ONLINE CO-OP — UP TO 4 PLAYERS

Share a join code and survive together. Everyone builds their own survivor, and everyone sees your look, gear, and weapons. Zombie kills, loot, doors, and world pickups all stay in sync. Play online with friends, or offline solo with full save support.

BUILD YOUR SURVIVOR

Create your character from scratch — body weight, musculature, skin tone, hair, and face. You start with nothing but your survivor in their underwear. Every piece of clothing and armor you find fits your body perfectly.

25 ARMOR SLOTS

Helmet, face mask, torso, shoulders, elbows, gloves, pants, knees, boots — 25 individual armor slots, all equippable. Find full sets, mix and match. Every combination changes how you look and how you play.

SURVIVAL WITH REAL WEIGHT

Hunger drains. Thirst builds. Stamina fades when you run, and the heavier your loadout, the faster it goes. Gear wears down — repair what you can, replace what you can't.

ZOMBIES THAT FIGHT BACK

Walkers, runners, lungers, exploders, toxic and contaminated infected — and the Brooder, who births three flying zombies when she falls. Zombies react to every hit. Blow off a leg and they crawl. Take the head and they drop.

THE ARSENAL

Thirteen firearms across every role — pistols, revolvers, SMGs, rifles, a bolt-action sniper, marksman rifles, shotguns, and a silent crossbow. A quick-melee button swings your holstered blade and snaps back to your gun without breaking stride.

EXPLOSIVES

Twelve throwables — grenades, Molotovs, freeze and surge grenades, sticky tack grenades, homing rounds, zombie attractors, and remote-detonated C4.

HORDE ZONES

Sealed-off areas where the doors lock and the wave system kicks in. Fight escalating hordes until you clear it. Optional, and brutal.

THE ZOMBIE VIRUS

Get infected and your max health decays. Manage it with antibodies, or find the cure before it's too late.

GAS MASKS + CONTAMINATION ZONES

Toxic fog fills parts of the world. Without a gas mask you won't last inside. Maintain your mask to push deeper.

LOOT THE DEAD

Death doesn't reset the world. When you die, your body reanimates as a zombie wearing all your gear. Fight your way back to it and reclaim your loadout.

SCAVENGE, REPAIR & TRADE

Zombie Guts are the currency of the apocalypse. Equip the Guts Collector to auto-pull them as you fight. Spend them at six specialized vendors, repair gear at the Repair Station, and stash your best loot between runs.

A GROWING WORLD

The map is small right now. It expands every month. New areas, enemies, weapons, and armor with every update.

COMING SOON

Multiple save slots. Crafting and building. New enemies. More clothing and armor variants.
description_short: A third-person open-world zombie survival RPG. Scavenge an above-ground town and the tunnel system beneath it, build your survivor across 25 armor slots, and fight the infected solo or in 4-player online co-op. Small world, growing every month.
